## Summary by CodeRabbit

- **Chores**
	- Streamlined the project configuration by removing unused external dependencies and simplifying compatibility requirements.
- **Refactor**
	- Aligned internal numerical integration routines with updated module references for improved consistency and performance.
	- Updated the method for generating Gauss-Hermite quadrature points to utilize a new source.

title: Remove unused dependencies.
